-- 1 of 3 --

Whenever you’re handing sensitive IP to third parties,
it runs the risk of getting stolen. In this lesson, I’m
going to teach you several ways to protect your
brand. And I’ll provide you with NDA and Brand
Authorization templates you can use and repurpose
for your own business.
Protecting Your Brand
Step 1: Sign a Mutual NDA
Step 2: Issue a Brand Authorization Letter (1 year)	LESSON:
PROTECTING YOUR BRAND
MODULE:
MANUFACTURING &
OPERATIONS AT SCALE
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Download the NDA and Brand Authorization Letter
templates.
❏ 	Customize them for your brand and send them to
your supplier.
